name: M4A4 | 红色 DDPAT
collection: 2021 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
collectionZh: 2021 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
descriptionEn: More accurate but less damaging than its AK-47 counterpart, the M4A4 is the full-auto assault rifle of choice for CTs. It has been painted using a red Digital Disruptive Pattern (DDPAT) hydrographic. By the time you're close enough to notice the pixels it's already too late
descriptionZh: 与同级的 AK-47 相比更精准，但杀伤力更低，M4A4 是反恐精英可选的全自动突击步枪。 这把武器绘有红色的数字迷彩（DDPAT）图案。 见微知著，为时不晚
